title: Forecasts 2010
body: **First of all, congratulate everyone on this holiday season and wish you a good new year.** As is usual at the end of the year, a lot is said and written about what happened in 2009, technologically, politically, socially, etc. Technologically speaking, this year has undoubtedly been the year of netBooks and perhaps also of touch mobile phones (iPhones, Androids and company). It hasn't been much more than a year since these small gadgets appeared on the market and phones with buttons and 15.4-inch laptops already seem like antiques to us. This year, which is already here, is believed to be the year of the electronic book (eBook) boom, and 3D movies in theaters will be very common. Waiting to get this: http://vimeo.com/8217311 New gadgets will appear, such as Apple's multi-touch tablet or the Google Nexus One, the Google mobile that will compete with the iPhone. Google will also possibly release a nebook or a tablet with its new Chrome OS operating system. You can mark up to 3 maximum, specify and detail in the [comments](#comments).
